creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Combing this PR with bug #278685, I guess you have incorrect/incomplete MAKE_ENV. There is nothing wrong with this port (shells/bash-completion). I cannot reproduce this error. And this port builds fine on our packaging building cluster.

[1] https://portsfallout.com/port?port=shells%2Fbash-completion&maintainer=
